news.t: Free Cash Flow and Fixed Income Strategies Gaining Attention in Today's Market
Faith Meets Fundamentals: Timothy Plan Launches 3 New ETFs
Timothy Plan Launches Three ETFs Focused on Free Cash Flow and Fixed Income

holdings.infoBox: TPFC is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are ServiceNow stock at 4.44%, Phillips 66 at 3.98%, NXP Semiconductors at 3.80%, Diamondback Energy at 3.77%, and Coeur Mining at 3.63%.

overview.description: The Timothy Plan Free Cash Flow ETF (TPFC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Victory Free Cash Flow BRI index. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap companies selected for strong free cash flow characteristics and growth metrics, while applying faith-based investment screens. TPFC was launched on May 5, 2026 and is issued by Timothy Plan.
infoTable: Victory Free Cash Flow BRI Index
